# Pentagonal

> Smart Contract Forge — Create, audit, and deploy production-grade smart contracts with AI-powered multi-agent security scanning.

For full technical details, see: https://pentagonal.ai/llms-full.txt

Pentagonal is a sovereign smart contract platform that generates, audits, and deploys Solidity and Rust smart contracts across 14 blockchain networks. It uses 8 autonomous AI security agents to pen-test every contract before deployment.

## Core Capabilities

- **Create**: Generate production-ready Solidity or Anchor/Rust smart contracts from natural language descriptions
- **Audit**: Run 8-agent parallel security scans (reentrancy, flash loans, access control, gas optimization, oracle manipulation, MEV/front-running, integer overflow, economic exploits)
- **Deploy** (Coming Soon): One-click deployment to 14 chains with verification included
- **Self-Learning Engine**: Accumulates security rules from every audit, making future contracts safer

## Supported Chains

### EVM (Solidity)
- Ethereum, Polygon, BSC, Arbitrum, Base, Optimism, Avalanche

### Non-EVM
- Solana (Anchor/Rust programs, SPL tokens)

### Testnets
- Sepolia, Amoy, Fuji, Arbitrum Sepolia, Base Sepolia, Optimism Sepolia, BSC Testnet, Solana Devnet

## Authentication

- Wallet connect (EVM + Solana)
- Google OAuth
- GitHub OAuth
- X/Twitter OAuth
- Email/password

## Payments

- Pay with crypto (EVM or Solana) for universal credits
- Credits used for contract generation and auditing

## Integration

### MCP Server
Pentagonal is available as an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI IDE integration. Connect via `npx` or Docker.

### Clawd Skill
Download the Pentagonal Clawd Skill for use with AI coding assistants. Provides tools for generate, audit, fix, compile, and chain selection.

## Links

- Website: https://pentagonal.ai
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/Pentagonalai
